original_prompt: Deprecate the Product Types entity. Upgrade view.item_types.js to absorb custom field configurations. Refactor view.appointments.js to use a quantity-based hardware counter UI instead of product checkboxes. Ensure view.appointment_detail.js perfectly maps these quantities to drag-and-drop validation slots.
rephrased_goal: Migrate core booking logic from Product Types to a quantity-based Hardware Type system. This involves unifying item catalog with custom field builders, updating the appointment creation UI with counters, and syncing the completion audit logic.

subtasks_required: Replace src/views/view.item_types.js with provided code including custom fields builder
tasks.testing_criteria: File content matches requested Hardware Catalog implementation
Verify presence of custom-field-item CSS and cf-container logic

subtasks_required: Replace src/views/view.appointments.js with provided code including hardware counters
tasks.testing_criteria: File content matches requested Hardware Quantity counter implementation
Verify presence of hw-counter-box and getHardwarePayload logic

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Clean Product Types from Appointment Detail View
subtasks_required: Remove product breakdown HTML and JS logic from src/views/view.appointment_detail.js

tasks.testing_criteria: Verify removal of productsBreakdown code block

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Final Deprecation of Product Types
subtasks_required: Remove Product Types link from src/index.html
Remove ProductTypesView import and router case from src/main.js
tasks.testing_criteria: Legacy Product Types logic is purged from shells
Navigation and router no longer contain product_types

subtasks_required: Update wiki to reflect unified hardware logistics
tasks.testing_criteria: App builds, tech stack is unified, Product Types are gone
